name: 06-30-runtime-action-availability-split
title: Runtime action availability split 收束
description: 实现 design backlog Slice 3 / D8：WorkspaceModule runtime operations 从 RuntimeGateway actor/context catalog 派生，AgentRun effective capability 只保留 visibility owner，WorkspaceModule/Extension presentation 使用 typed readiness diagnostics 表达 gateway/channel/backend/artifact 缺失，前端 bridge 不再把 Project-level runtime_actions projection 当作执行可用性。
creator: codex-agent
